hero.intro: I build web, mobile, and backend-focused projects with C#, ASP.NET Core, React, Flutter, and PHP. I care about connecting user interfaces, services, and data flows into reliable product experiences.
hero.photoAlt: Profile photo of Rabia Nur Akdaş
hero.photoFallback: Add Rabia_Nur_Akdas_Photo.jpg to the public folder to display the profile photo.

about.title: I am a recent computer engineering graduate who keeps growing in software development.
about.description: I focus on building projects across web, mobile, backend, and database development with a practical, multi-technology approach.
paragraphs: I am a recent computer engineering graduate. Through projects built with C#, ASP.NET Core, React, Flutter, PHP, and database technologies, I have gained hands-on experience across web, mobile, and backend development.
I enjoy working on user interfaces, API integrations, data persistence, and complete project flows. Readable code, problem solving, and continuous improvement matter a lot to me.
In web and mobile projects, I have experienced how interfaces, API connections, and database processes work together.
I value teamwork, learning through feedback, and exploring new technologies through real project needs.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: I have built web application flows with React, ASP.NET Core, PHP, and Laravel.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: I have worked on mobile interfaces, forms, and API connections with Flutter and Dart.

data.title: Data and Persistence
data.description: I have practiced storing, relating, and querying data with SQL Server, MySQL, and SQLite.

learning.title: Learning Discipline
learning.description: I turn what I learn into small experiments first, then apply it in real project flows.

projects.title: Selected work showing my backend, mobile, and AI practice.
projects.description: Each project is structured around problem solving, technology choices, integrations, and clear learning outcomes.
projects.openDemoLabel: Open {{title}} live demo in a new tab
projects.openGithubLabel: Open {{title}} GitHub repository in a new tab

libraryManagement.title: Library Management
libraryManagement.shortDescription: A layered ASP.NET Core web application covering books, users, orders, favorites, reviews, and admin workflows.

fullStackAiChat.title: FullStack AI Chat
fullStackAiChat.shortDescription: A chat application built with a React web client, Expo React Native mobile client, and ASP.NET Core backend. Messages are stored in SQLite and analyzed for sentiment through a Python service.

bookVerse.title: BookVerse
bookVerse.shortDescription: A book-sharing platform built with Flutter and a Laravel REST API. Users can share books, manage favorites, message each other, and handle exchange flows.

blogApp.title: BlogApp
blogApp.shortDescription: A blog application built with Flutter and a Laravel REST API. Users can publish posts, comment, and interact through likes.

petShopWeb.title: PetShop Web
petShopWeb.shortDescription: A pet products e-commerce app built with PHP and MySQL, including product listing, category filtering, and cart flows.

trafficVehicle.title: Traffic Sign Recognition and Obstacle-Avoiding Autonomous Vehicle
trafficVehicle.shortDescription: A Python-based computer vision autonomous vehicle project focused on traffic sign detection and obstacle avoidance decisions.

skills.title: Technology Stack
skills.description: A simple category-based overview of the technologies I use.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: My focus area for APIs, data access, and server-side application development.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Technologies I use for web interfaces and client-side development.

mobile.title: Mobile
mobile.description: Client technologies I use in mobile application projects.

database.description: Databases I have worked with for storing and querying project data.

tools.description: Tools I use for development, version control, and API testing workflows.

other.description: Additional areas included in my project experience.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: During my internships, I contributed to development, integration, and testing processes.

highlights: Developed user interfaces, forms, and detail pages with Flutter and GetX.
Integrated REST API services and managed JSON-based data flows.
Tested API issues in service and mobile app integrations and contributed to the resolution process.
Contributed to team version control and development workflows using Git.
Contributed to the development of a machine learning-based AI model with Python.
Applied data preprocessing steps and supported the model training process.
Tested model outputs and gained practical experience in performance evaluation.

contact.title: Let’s work together.
contact.description: Feel free to reach out about software development, technology, projects, or career opportunities.
contact.cardTitle: Open to New Ideas and Collaborations
contact.cardDescription: Feel free to reach out about software development, technology, projects, or career opportunities. I always value creating new ideas, learning, and working together.
